heading: Report on the long-term health effects of living organ donation
label: 273b Report on the long-term health effects of living organ donation
text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter, the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall submit to the appropriate committees of Congress a report that details the progress made towards understanding the long-term health effects of living organ donation.December 21, 2007
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Charlie W. Norwood Living Organ Donation Act, and not as part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.
